content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad weakness across indices with NIFTY -0.98%, Bank Nifty -0.82%, Auto/Realty/Energy down sharply, and India VIX spiking +9.4% to 18.4 — classic risk-off tape on geopolitical/crude concerns. However, defensives (IT, Pharma, FMCG) are holding up better and several held names are showing strong post-Q4 momentum (PNBHOUSING +3.77%, COFORGE +6.44%, DABUR +3.77%, POLYCAB at 52w high, BAJAJ-AUTO at 52w high). Focus is position management — trail SLs on winners, no new admits into a VIX spike without clear setup edge.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+10.4% winner approaching 52w high (1141.90). Current SL 1073.10 already locks in +9% gain (above entry 984), trail-gap to CMP 1086.30 is 1.2% — within the 1% floor so no further tightening needed (any tighter risks self-stopout on noise). Target nudged to 1140 to align with 52w high resistance. HOLD-equivalent on SL but target refresh."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "VIX +9.4%, geopolitical risk-off, gold ETF is the hedge — keep position intact at -1.1%, SL 121 (-2.2% from CMP) reasonable. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock near ATH (843.15), CMP 833.80, +1.7% unrealized. Current SL 820 = at entry. FMCG rotation strong (DABUR +3.77% sympathy). Raising SL to 825 (above entry, +0.6% lock-in) — trail gap to CMP 833.80 is 1.05%, just above the 1% floor. Tightening only marginally to respect SL-monotonic rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "new_target": 1430.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "+9.2% winner on Q4 beat momentum. CMP 1374.20, current SL 1352 (1.6% below CMP, above 1% floor — good). Target lifted modestly to 1430 given strong IT defensive rotation and order book strength. SL held at 1352 to avoid micro-adjust below 0.5% threshold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "-0.5% near entry. SL 3000 (-1.7% from CMP 3051) within calibrated risk. Defence sector thesis intact, HAL results May 13 are sector read-across not direct binary. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+2.9% gain, CMP 829.45, SL 820 (1.1% below CMP — exactly at floor). No change to SL (would breach 1% floor if raised); no-op MODIFY avoided. Actually issuing HOLD-equivalent values to confirm trail discipline. SL already locks in +1.7% from entry 806."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-2.6% near SL 1465 (CMP 1476, 0.7% above SL). Q4 was strong (+37% PAT) — fade is noise, thesis intact. Rule 17: do not front-run own SL. Hold and let SL fire or chart recover."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.7% gain. Research flagged NEUTRAL/-0.05 — post-result distribution selling. SL 1580 (-1.6% from CMP 1606.50) within floor. Hold but watch — would have favored exit but Rule 17 says respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Flat +0.1%. SL 2755 (-1.2% from CMP 2780.80). Strong Q4, refrigerants capex catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, at 52w high 9083. SL 9020 (-0.7% from CMP) — already tight. Hold; if it pushes higher will trail next cycle. Avoid micro-adjust here."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.8%. Strong Q4 sequential, defense order book growing. SL 1955 (-1.7% from CMP 1989.70) within budget. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-2.0%, near SL 354 (CMP 362.95, 2.5% above SL). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie OW ₹415 target. BFSI weak today but ABCAPITAL thesis intact. Respect SL — Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.8%. Strong Q4, buyback at ₹12,000 (~12% above CMP) is structural support. SL 10440 (-1.2% from CMP 10566) within budget. Auto sector weak today but stock-specific catalyst (buyback) overrides. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.1%. Q4 beat, raised FY27 guidance, stock +3.77% in market data (note discrepancy: position shows CMP 481.85 but stock data shows 487.70 +3.77%). Either way SL 472 below CMP gives room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1200.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+1.2%, CMP 1241.20, at 52w high. Q4 results PENDING in May — Rule 11 binary event. Research notes Kotak SELL with ₹800 target and 48x P/E concerns. Tightening SL from 1190 to 1200 (now -3.3% from CMP, still above 1% floor). Will exit pre-results next cycles if results date confirmed within 3 sessions. Trail gap 3.3% gives room for chop while capping tail."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 from 7478m ago (5+ days) — should already have expired/been cleaned. Not stacking. If still open, would CANCEL but engine likely already handled."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1073.10, "reasoning": "+10.4% winner, SL already trailed above entry, gap to CMP 1.2% — at floor."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Hedge against VIX spike, no change."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 825.00, "reasoning": "Lift SL to 825 (above entry breakeven+) — gap to CMP 833.80 = 1.05%, at floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1352.00, "reasoning": "SL already locks in +7.4% from entry, gap 1.6% — fine."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3000.00, "reasoning": "Within risk budget, thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "SL already above entry, gap at floor."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1465.00, "reasoning": "Respect SL — Rule 17 anti-front-run."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Distribution post-results but SL within budget."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2755.00, "reasoning": "Flat, thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9020.00, "reasoning": "At 52w high, SL gap 0.7% — already tight, no further micro-adjust."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955.00, "reasoning": "Within budget, defense catalyst intact."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 354.00, "reasoning": "Respect SL, BFSI noise."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 10440.00, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at ₹12,000 supportive."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 472.00, "reasoning": "Raised guidance, FMCG rotation supportive."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1200.00, "reasoning": "Tighten ahead of pending Q4 results (Rule 11 prep), gap to CMP 3.3%."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "No new admits today despite some bullish candidates (PIDILITIND research +0.10, BAJAJ-AUTO +0.15, ABCAPITAL +0.12 — all already held). New names considered and rejected: THERMAX/NUVAMA (extreme gap-up on no fundamentals visible to me, chase risk into VIX spike); FINCABLES/POLYCAB-add (would breach Capital Goods cluster cap — GRSE+POLYCAB+BHARATFORG already represent the theme); DABUR-add (FMCG cluster already MARICO+DABUR-as-watchlist read-across — holding MARICO covers the rotation); CRAFTSMAN/CARTRADE (auto sector weak, no clear thesis on volume spike without confirmed catalyst); HCLTECH (52w low contrarian needs catalyst); BERGEPAINT (binary results May 12, 1 session — Rule 11 disqualifies new entry); CAMS-add (already held, no room without breaching position sizing). Book is 65% deployed across 15 names — healthy concentration. With VIX +9.4% and broad-market -1%, restraint on new admits IS the trade today. Rule 18: each rejected candidate above has explicit per-name reason.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 65%, cash 35% — within soft target range. 5-day win rate 12% / profit factor 0.5x signals over-trading or poor entry quality recently — today is a position-management day, not an admit day. VIX spike + crude + geopolitical = capital preservation priority. Trailing SLs activated on winners (PNBHOUSING/MARICO/COFORGE-equiv, LAURUSLABS tightened pre-binary). Watching for clean post-VIX setups in subsequent sessions when tape stabilizes. No cluster-stack violations, no binary-event new entries, no same-name re-entries."
}
